query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `coaching_cases` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `agentId` int NOT NULL,
  `agentCrdts` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `agentAlias` varchar(100),
  `nestingLabel` varchar(50),
  `assignedBy` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `cycleKey` varchar(7) NOT NULL,
  `followUpDate` varchar(10),
  `coachingReason` text NOT NULL,
  `whatHappened` text,
  `afterCoaching` text,
  `nextSteps` text,
  `status` enum('pending','in_progress','improved','no_change','escalated','terminated') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `statusNote` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `coaching_case_status_log` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `caseId` int NOT NULL,
  `fromStatus` varchar(50),
  `toStatus` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `note` text,
  `changedBy` varchar(255),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
